title: lobelia proctorii
intro: Lobelia proctorii, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Lobelia proctorii are attributed to its alkaloid content, which includes lobeline and lobelanine, known for their stimulant and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia proctorii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve mental clarity. Lobelia proctorii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also smoked, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
